---
title: 'Aiden Black: Veteran Status Effect on Income Wage'
author: "Aiden Black"
date: "2026-04-28"
output: pdf_document
header-includes:
  - \usepackage{booktabs}
  - \usepackage{float}
  - \usepackage[section]{placeins}
  - \usepackage{longtable}
  - \usepackage{array}
  - \usepackage{multirow}
  - \usepackage{wrapfig}
  - \usepackage{xcolor}
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo = FALSE,
  warning = FALSE,
  message = FALSE
)
```

```{r}
library(ggplot2)
library(tidyverse)
library(dplyr)
library(stargazer)
library(sandwich)
library(lmtest)
library(lfe)
library(kableExtra)

options(stargazer.no.space = TRUE)
options(stargazer.table.layout = "l")
```

```{r}
vetcash <- read.csv("VETCASH4.csv")
```

```{r}
set.seed(123)

df <- vetcash %>%
  mutate(
    incwage = as.numeric(INCWAGE)) %>%
  filter(
    !is.na(SEX),
    !is.na(VETSTAT),
    !is.na(incwage), incwage > 0,
    !is.na(EDUCD), EDUCD == 101,
    !is.na(OCC2010),
    !is.na(DEGFIELD),
    !is.na(VETDISAB),
    !is.na(DIFFCARE),
    !is.na(DIFFREM),
    !is.na(METRO)
  ) %>%
  sample_n(500000) %>%
  mutate(
    female = ifelse(SEX == 2, 1, 0),
    veteran = ifelse(VETSTAT == 2, 1, 0),
    log_wage = log(incwage)
  )

n_total <- nrow(df)
```

```{r make-summary-overall}
sum_overall <- df %>%
  summarise(
    N = format(n(), big.mark = ","),
    mean_wage = mean(incwage, na.rm = TRUE),
    median_wage = median(incwage, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_log_wage = mean(log_wage, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_age = mean(AGE, na.rm = TRUE),
    female_share = mean(female, na.rm = TRUE),
    veteran_share = mean(veteran, na.rm = TRUE)
  )
```

```{r table-summary-overall}
knitr::kable(sum_overall,
             format = "latex",
             booktabs = TRUE,
             caption = "Overall Summary Statistics") %>%
   kableExtra::kable_styling(latex_options = "HOLD_position")
```

```{r make-summary-by-vet}
sum_by_vet <- df %>%
  group_by(veteran) %>%
  summarise(
    N = format(n(), big.mark = ","),
    mean_wage = mean(incwage, na.rm = TRUE),
    median_wage = median(incwage, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_log_wage = mean(log_wage, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_age = mean(AGE, na.rm = TRUE),
    female_share = mean(female, na.rm = TRUE)
  )
```

```{r table-summary-by-vet}
knitr::kable(sum_by_vet,
             format = "latex",
             booktabs = TRUE,
             caption = "Summary Statistics by Veteran Status") %>%
   kableExtra::kable_styling(latex_options = "HOLD_position")
```

```{r}
ggplot(df, aes(x = log_wage, fill = factor(veteran))) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.6) +
  labs(
    title = "Figure 1: Distribution of Log Wages by Veteran Status",
    x = "Log Wage Income",
    y = "Density",
    fill = "Veteran Status"
  ) +
  scale_fill_discrete(labels = c("Non-Veteran", "Veteran")) +
  theme_minimal()
```

```{r}
age_wage <- df %>%
  group_by(veteran, AGE) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_log_wage = mean(log_wage, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )
```

```{r}
ggplot(age_wage, aes(x = AGE, y = mean_log_wage, color = factor(veteran))) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1) +
  labs(
    title = "Figure 2: Mean Log Wages by Age and Veteran Status",
    x = "Age",
    y = "Mean Log Wage",
    color = "Veteran Status"
  ) +
  scale_color_discrete(labels = c("Non-Veteran", "Veteran")) +
  theme_minimal()
```

```{r}
year_wage <- df %>%
  group_by(veteran, YEAR) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_log_wage = mean(log_wage, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )
```

```{r}
ggplot(year_wage, aes(x = YEAR, y = mean_log_wage, color = factor(veteran))) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1) +
  geom_point() +
  labs(
    title = "Figure 3: Mean Log Wage by Year and Veteran Status",
    x = "Year",
    y = "Mean Log Wage",
    color = "Veteran"
  ) +
  scale_color_discrete(labels = c("Non-Veteran", "Veteran")) +
  theme_minimal()
```

```{r}
resid_model <- felm(log_wage ~ AGE + female + DIFFCARE + DIFFREM + VETDISAB | METRO + YEAR + DEGFIELD + OCC2010, data = df)

df$resid_wage <- resid(resid_model)
```

```{r make-regressions}
reg1 <- lm(log_wage ~ veteran, data = df)
reg2 <- lm(log_wage ~ veteran + AGE + female, data = df)
reg3 <- felm(log_wage ~ veteran + AGE + female | METRO + YEAR, data = df)
reg4 <- felm(log_wage ~ veteran + AGE + female | METRO + YEAR + DEGFIELD + OCC2010, data = df)
reg5 <- felm(log_wage ~ veteran + AGE + female + DIFFCARE + DIFFREM + VETDISAB | METRO + YEAR + DEGFIELD + OCC2010, data = df)


robust_se_1 <- sqrt(diag(vcovHC(reg1, type = "HC1")))
robust_se_2 <- sqrt(diag(vcovHC(reg2, type = "HC1")))
robust_se_3 <- sqrt(diag(vcovHC(reg3, type = "HC1")))
robust_se_4 <- sqrt(diag(vcovHC(reg4, type = "HC1")))
robust_se_5 <- sqrt(diag(vcovHC(reg5, type = "HC1")))
```

```{r table-regressions, results='asis'}
stargazer(reg1, reg2, reg3, reg4, reg5,
          type = "latex",
          float = TRUE,
          table.placement = "H",
          se = list(robust_se_1, robust_se_2, robust_se_3, robust_se_4, robust_se_5),
          digits = 3,
          title = "Regression Results",
          dep.var.labels = "Log Wage Income",
          column.labels = c("Raw", "Controls", "METRO + Year", "Degree + Job", "Full Model"),
          covariate.labels = c("Veteran", "Female", "Age"),
          omit = c("factor\\(YEAR\\)", "factor\\(DEGFIELD\\)", "factor\\(OCC2010\\)", "factor\\(DIFFCARE\\)", "factor\\(DIFFREM\\)", "factor\\(VETDISAB\\)", "factor\\(METRO\\)"),
          keep.stat = c("n", "rsq", "adj.rsq"))
```

```{r make-regressionsAge}
regAge <- lm(log_wage ~ veteran + AGE, data = df)

robust_se_Age <- sqrt(diag(vcovHC(regAge, type = "HC1")))
```

```{r table-RegressionAge, results='asis'}
stargazer(regAge, reg2, 
          type = "latex",
          float = TRUE,
          table.placement = "H",
          se = list(robust_se_Age, robust_se_2),
          digits = 3,
          title = "Age Control Regression",
          dep.var.labels = "Log Wage Income",
          column.labels = c("Age", "Age + Female"),
          covariate.labels = c("Veteran", "Age", "Female"),
          keep.stat = c("n", "rsq", "adj.rsq"))
```

```{r}
ggplot(df, aes(x = resid_wage, fill = factor(veteran))) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.5) +
  labs(title = "Residual Log Wages by Veteran Status",
       x = "Log Wage (Residualized)",
       fill = "Veteran") +
  theme_minimal()
```
